prompt: A warm Italian food advertisement poster. A cheerful Italian grandmother in a classic red apron tosses fresh pasta in the air beside a giant premium pasta box 3x her height with vintage Italian countryside illustrations on the packaging, "BELLA PASTA" written in classic red and gold italic font on the box. Warm rustic Italian kitchen background with hanging dried herbs copper pots and brick walls. Classic warm serif typography "BELLA PASTA" in red and gold filling the background. Tagline bottom: "Made with amore." Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, authentic Italian food lifestyle editorial, warm rustic kitchen lighting.
